key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh the quota data (1, 2, 5, 10, or 60 minutes)

key.name: credentials-version
key.description: Incremented whenever the user saves a new API key in preferences, signalling the running extension to reload credentials

key.name: kilo-credentials-path
key.description: Custom path to Kilo's auth.json. Empty string means auto-detect at ~/.local/share/kilo/auth.json

key.name: opencode-credentials-path
key.description: Custom path to OpenCode's auth.json. Empty string means auto-detect at ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json

key.name: enabled-providers
key.description: List of enabled provider IDs, e.g. ['zai', 'copilot']

key.name: provider-order
key.description: Order of provider IDs for display in the panel popup and settings page. First entry = leftmost column in popup.

key.name: zai-credential-source
key.description: How to obtain Z.ai credentials: 'api_key' for manual GNOME Keyring entry, 'kilo' for Kilo CLI auth.json, 'opencode' for OpenCode auth.json

key.name: copilot-credential-source
key.description: How to obtain Copilot credentials: 'kilo' for Kilo CLI auth.json (only option currently)

key.name: primary-quota-id
key.description: String-based quota ID for the panel indicator, e.g. 'zai-weekly', 'copilot-premium'. Empty string means auto-select first available.

key.name: notifications-enabled
key.description: Show desktop notifications when token quotas fall below configured thresholds
